criteria.name: studio_controls_keyboard_operable
criteria.description: Every interactive control — Preview/Components/Saved Themes/Export tabs, Phone/Tablet/Desktop toggles, Palette accordion rows, tool fields, editor actions (Copy, Undo, Redo, Save), Export Download/Copy/Import, command palette results, and saved-theme card Load/Delete — is reachable and operable with the keyboard alone (Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter/Space), each showing a visible focus indicator when focused.
criteria.reasoning: Observed studio_controls_keyboard_operable manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: tutorial_and_theme_form_dialogs_manage_focus
criteria.description: The Tutorial modal, the theme create/rename forms, and the command palette use role dialog with aria-modal true, trap focus while open, close on Escape, and return focus to the control that opened them.
criteria.reasoning: Observed tutorial_and_theme_form_dialogs_manage_focus manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: chrome_icons_have_accessible_names
criteria.description: Meaningful header icons (GitHub, Material logo mark, and similar action icons) expose descriptive accessible names or alt text so assistive technology can identify them.
criteria.reasoning: Observed chrome_icons_have_accessible_names manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: validation_and_status_announced_live
criteria.description: Validation and status messages (invalid name, duplicate name, invalid #RRGGBB field paths, fontSize/borderRadius bounds, Type↔palette.type cross-field errors, invalid options, save status, import field errors, WCAG Fail labels) are shown visually and announced via an aria-live polite region.
criteria.reasoning: Observed validation_and_status_announced_live manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: theme_name_field_explicitly_labeled
criteria.description: Theme create and rename name fields use an explicit label element associated with the control.
criteria.reasoning: Observed theme_name_field_explicitly_labeled manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: palette_accordions_expose_expanded_state
criteria.description: Palette accordion rows expose their expanded/collapsed state to assistive technology and toggle with Enter or Space.
criteria.reasoning: Observed palette_accordions_expose_expanded_state manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: workspace_landmarks_present
criteria.description: The app exposes semantic landmarks (for example nav or tablist for the main tabs and main for the Preview/Components/Saved Themes/Export workspace) so assistive technology can navigate the studio.
criteria.reasoning: Observed workspace_landmarks_present manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: shell_and_tool_contrast
criteria.description: Dark-shell labels, tab text, tool-panel titles, and primary controls meet sufficient contrast against their near-black or indigo-accented surfaces.
criteria.reasoning: Observed shell_and_tool_contrast manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: tabs_and_device_toggles_keyboard_semantics
criteria.description: Main tabs and Phone/Tablet/Desktop toggles are keyboard-operable with button/tab semantics and a visible selected/active state exposed to assistive technology.
criteria.reasoning: Observed tabs_and_device_toggles_keyboard_semantics manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: reduced_motion_respected
criteria.description: With prefers-reduced-motion set, tab indicator slides, accordion expand/collapse, theme-card enter/exit, modal opacity/scale, and toast slide/fade are removed or reduced to instant state changes while every flow remains completable.
criteria.reasoning: Observed reduced_motion_respected manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: compare_and_colorblind_state_not_color_only
criteria.description: Color-blindness mode and Before/After compare expose their selected state to assistive technology with text or ARIA state, not by color alone.
criteria.reasoning: Observed compare_and_colorblind_state_not_color_only manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: multi_facet_reload_resets_to_seed
criteria.description: Starting from seed: create a new saved theme, edit primary main to a distinct hex, switch the main tab to Components, and toggle Type to Dark; then reload. Confirm every facet coherently resets to the seeded baseline — at least three seeded themes, default theme active, Preview tab, light type, and no unsaved edits — never a mix of surviving and reverted facets.
criteria.reasoning: Observed multi_facet_reload_resets_to_seed manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: light_dark_reversal_proves_live_state
criteria.description: Type-toggle reversal proof (genre stand-in for sort reversal): toggle Type to Dark and note preview background/paper/text/divider plus editor source, toggle back to Light and note the different surfaces/source, then toggle Dark again. Confirm Dark's surfaces return identically — proving preview and editor are derived from live theme options, not two hardcoded snapshots.
criteria.reasoning: Observed light_dark_reversal_proves_live_state manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: palette_edit_derived_preview_sensitivity
criteria.description: Derived-view sensitivity: change primary main to a clearly different hex, then change secondary main. Confirm the framed sample site and editor ThemeOptions source change meaningfully for each input rather than redrawing an identical surface regardless of edits.
criteria.reasoning: Observed palette_edit_derived_preview_sensitivity manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: palette_edit_echoes_in_editor_and_saved_card
criteria.description: Cross-view echo: edit primary main in the Palette tool; without reload confirm the editor source hex, the framed sample site's primary surfaces, the Export JSON/CSS text, and — after Save — the active Saved Themes card swatch all reflect the new color.
criteria.reasoning: Observed palette_edit_echoes_in_editor_and_saved_card manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: create_theme_count_delta_exact
criteria.description: Count-delta integrity: measure the Saved Themes card count, create one valid new theme via New Theme, and re-measure immediately — the count increases by exactly one (no off-by-one, no lagging counter).
criteria.reasoning: Observed create_theme_count_delta_exact manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: different_palette_edits_different_outcomes
criteria.description: Input-dependent output: set primary main to color A and note preview/editor; then set primary main to a clearly different color B. Confirm the two outcomes differ in the ways the inputs dictate (not byte-identical preview/editor states).
criteria.reasoning: Observed different_palette_edits_different_outcomes manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: interleaved_create_and_tab_flows
criteria.description: Interleaved-flow integrity: open New Theme and enter a name without submitting, switch the main tab to Components, then return and submit a different valid name to finish creating one theme; confirm exactly one new Saved Themes card appears, the tab switch persisted, and neither flow corrupted the other's state.
criteria.reasoning: Observed interleaved_create_and_tab_flows manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: empty_then_repopulate_saved_themes
criteria.description: Edge-state round-trip: delete every saved theme (empty-state message visible), then create two new themes; confirm the empty state clears, both new cards appear, and editor/preview track the loaded active theme.
criteria.reasoning: Observed empty_then_repopulate_saved_themes manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: export_contains_session_hex_after_edit
criteria.description: Input-dependent export artifact: set primary main to color A and note the Export JSON text, then set primary main to a clearly different color B. Confirm the two Export JSON (and CSS) previews differ by carrying each session's hex — not an identical static artifact.
criteria.reasoning: Observed export_contains_session_hex_after_edit manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: import_export_round_trip_restores_state
criteria.description: Round-trip probe: edit primary main to a distinct #RRGGBB hex and shape.borderRadius to a distinct in-range value, note palette.type plus typography.fontSize in the Export JSON, copy that JSON text, change the color, radius, and fontSize away, then Import the JSON. Confirm editor fields, Type toggle, preview surfaces, and Export text all restore the imported hex, type, fontSize, and borderRadius without a reload.
criteria.reasoning: Observed import_export_round_trip_restores_state manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: undo_restores_export_text
criteria.description: Undo artifact coherence: after a Palette edit that changes Export text, Undo restores the previous Export preview text together with tool field, editor source, and preview.
criteria.reasoning: Observed undo_restores_export_text manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: export_json_fields_track_font_size_edit
criteria.description: Input-dependent schema fields: change typography.fontSize within 8–24 and shape.borderRadius within 0–24 to different values and confirm the Export ThemeOptions JSON preview's fontSize and borderRadius values update to match without a reload, with palette.type still agreeing with the Type toggle.
criteria.reasoning: Observed export_json_fields_track_font_size_edit manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: seeded_themes_visible
criteria.description: On load, Saved Themes (or the saved list after opening that tab) shows at least 3 seeded theme rows with names visible
criteria.reasoning: Observed seeded_themes_visible manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: create_named_theme_visible
criteria.description: After creating a saved theme named 'Harbor Indigo' with valid required fields, the text 'Harbor Indigo' is visible under Saved Themes
criteria.reasoning: Observed create_named_theme_visible manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: create_three_count_delta
criteria.description: After adding 3 new saved themes on top of the seed set, Saved Themes shows exactly 3 more rows than the initial seeded count
criteria.reasoning: Observed create_three_count_delta manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: load_theme_applies_options
criteria.description: After loading a saved theme, the Preview surfaces and/or Monaco editor reflect that theme's options
criteria.reasoning: Observed load_theme_applies_options manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: rename_theme_updates_name
criteria.description: After editing a saved theme name to 'Evening Paper', the text 'Evening Paper' is visible and the previous name is not
criteria.reasoning: Observed rename_theme_updates_name manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: delete_theme_removes_name
criteria.description: After deleting a saved theme, that theme name is no longer visible under Saved Themes
criteria.reasoning: Observed delete_theme_removes_name manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: empty_state_after_last_delete
criteria.description: After deleting all saved themes, an empty state message with a way to create a new theme is visible in the Saved Themes region
criteria.reasoning: Observed empty_state_after_last_delete manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: empty_name_create_rejected
criteria.description: After submitting create with an empty required theme name, the saved themes count does not increase and a visible inline validation message names the name field
criteria.reasoning: Observed empty_name_create_rejected manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: light_dark_toggle_recolors
criteria.description: After toggling Light/Dark palette Type, preview surfaces recolor without full page navigation
criteria.reasoning: Observed light_dark_toggle_recolors manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: tab_switch_no_navigation
criteria.description: After switching from Preview to Saved Themes, Components, or Export, the main canvas shows the other mode without full page navigation
criteria.reasoning: Observed tab_switch_no_navigation manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: device_toggle_reframes
criteria.description: After switching among Phone / Tablet / Desktop device frames, the preview chrome reframes without leaving the page
criteria.reasoning: Observed device_toggle_reframes manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: palette_edit_save_flow
criteria.description: Changing the primary main color in the Palette tool recolors the sample site's primary surfaces immediately, rewrites the ThemeOptions source in the editor to the new hex, and flips the save status to unsaved; after activating Save, the status returns to saved and the active theme's card under Saved Themes shows the updated swatch without a reload
criteria.reasoning: Observed palette_edit_save_flow manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: saved_theme_crud_shared_state
criteria.description: Saved themes collection supports create, edit, and delete with list rows and derived counts updating from shared application state
criteria.reasoning: Observed saved_theme_crud_shared_state manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: saved_theme_search_filter
criteria.description: Typing a query into the saved-themes search filters the visible cards to matching names, a query matching no theme names shows an empty result state, and clearing the query restores the full card set
criteria.reasoning: Observed saved_theme_search_filter manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: editor_bisync_invalid_status
criteria.description: The Monaco editor stays bi-synced with the tool panels: editing a Palette color rewrites the ThemeOptions source, editing valid source updates the tools and preview, and invalid source surfaces an invalid-options status instead of applying while the preview keeps rendering the last valid theme
criteria.reasoning: Observed editor_bisync_invalid_status manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: palette_accordion_intent_fields
criteria.description: The Palette tool lists expandable accordion rows including a Light/Dark Type toggle (palette.type light or dark), Background, Text, Divider, and the six intent colors (primary, secondary, error, warning, info, success), each intent expanding to main / light / dark / contrastText fields that accept six-digit hex with a leading hash and stay live with the editor
criteria.reasoning: Observed palette_accordion_intent_fields manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: fonts_add_remove_roboto_protected
criteria.description: The Fonts tool adds a Google font by name, rejects a duplicate family with visible feedback and no duplicate list entry, removes a font, and keeps the base Roboto family protected from removal (its remove control absent or disabled)
criteria.reasoning: Observed fonts_add_remove_roboto_protected manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: components_gallery_search_filters
criteria.description: The Components panel renders a searchable gallery of roughly two dozen themed component demos that filters as the search text changes, with a filterable drawer nav that jumps to a section via same-document anchors only
criteria.reasoning: Observed components_gallery_search_filters manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: device_widths_and_templates
criteria.description: The Preview device toggles Phone / Tablet / Desktop reframe the sample chrome to roughly 375px / 768px / full width, and the frame cycles through at least six named sample templates
criteria.reasoning: Observed device_widths_and_templates manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: header_chrome_tutorial_modal
criteria.description: The header shows the product title Material-UI Theme Creator, an inert version chip, and a Tutorial control that opens an in-page modal; activating the GitHub icon leaves the page where it is
criteria.reasoning: Observed header_chrome_tutorial_modal manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: copy_theme_code_toast
criteria.description: The editor actions row offers Editor Settings (toggling the editor color theme), Undo, Redo, and Save with status text, and activating Copy theme code shows a confirmation toast
criteria.reasoning: Observed copy_theme_code_toast manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: undo_redo_roundtrip
criteria.description: After a tool edit, activating Undo restores the previous value in the tool field, the ThemeOptions editor source, and the preview together; activating Redo reapplies the edit across all three surfaces
criteria.reasoning: Observed undo_redo_roundtrip manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: typography_font_size_bounded
criteria.description: The Typography tool sets typography.fontFamily from the loaded fonts and typography.fontSize as an integer from 8 through 24 inclusive; shape.borderRadius is a number from 0 through 24 inclusive kept live with the editor; entering a size outside 8 through 24 or a borderRadius outside 0 through 24 is rejected or clamped with visible feedback naming the fontSize or borderRadius field instead of being applied verbatim
criteria.reasoning: Observed typography_font_size_bounded manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: snippet_preset_applies_toast
criteria.description: Activating a Snippets preset (e.g. Dense spacing, Rounded shapes, or Button casing) visibly patches the ThemeOptions source — Rounded shapes updates shape.borderRadius within 0–24 — and shows a confirmation toast
criteria.reasoning: Observed snippet_preset_applies_toast manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: create_theme_flow_chain
criteria.description: Activating New Theme and submitting a valid name closes the form, increases the saved-themes card count by exactly one measured immediately around the submit, shows the new card with its swatches and meta line, and loading that new card immediately rewrites the editor source and recolors the framed sample site without a reload
criteria.reasoning: Observed create_theme_flow_chain manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: light_dark_cross_panel_roundtrip
criteria.description: Toggling Type to Dark recolors the preview background, paper, text, and divider surfaces and updates the editor source; switching to the Components panel shows the same dark surfaces across the component demos, and toggling back to Light restores the light surfaces on every panel without a document navigation
criteria.reasoning: Observed light_dark_cross_panel_roundtrip manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: delete_loaded_theme_clears_active
criteria.description: After loading a theme and then confirming its delete, its card is removed, the card count decreases by exactly one measured around the delete, and no card is marked active until another theme is loaded
criteria.reasoning: Observed delete_loaded_theme_clears_active manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: reload_restores_seeded_state
criteria.description: After creating a theme and editing palette values, a page reload returns the app to its seeded state: the seeded themes are listed, the default theme is active, and the unsaved edits and created theme from before the reload are gone
criteria.reasoning: Observed reload_restores_seeded_state manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: submit_disabled_until_valid_name
criteria.description: In the theme create and rename forms, the name field shows a per-field inline error naming the field when it is empty and the submit control stays disabled until the name is valid
criteria.reasoning: Observed submit_disabled_until_valid_name manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: load_resets_dirty_state
criteria.description: Loading a saved theme resets the save status to saved and clears the pending dirty/undo state, shown by the status text immediately after the load
criteria.reasoning: Observed load_resets_dirty_state manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: export_panel_live_json_css
criteria.description: The Export panel shows live-compiled ThemeOptions JSON and CSS variables format tabs; after changing primary main to a distinct #RRGGBB hex and shape.borderRadius to a distinct value within 0–24, both previews update to include those values without a reload, and the JSON preview also shows palette.type, typography.fontFamily, typography.fontSize, and shape.borderRadius field names with the session's values
criteria.reasoning: Observed export_panel_live_json_css manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: export_download_and_copy
criteria.description: Export offers Download JSON, Download CSS, and Copy export: Download triggers a real file download of the visible format text, and Copy writes that exact visible text to the clipboard with a confirmation toast
criteria.reasoning: Observed export_download_and_copy manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: import_themeoptions_applies
criteria.description: Import ThemeOptions with a valid declared-theme JSON payload (name ≤64 chars, palette.type light|dark, intent main/light/dark/contrastText #RRGGBB channels, typography.fontFamily, typography.fontSize 8-24, shape.borderRadius 0-24, Type↔palette.type cross-field) replaces editor, tools, Type toggle, and preview with those options and flips save status to unsaved; a malformed or contract-invalid payload shows a visible error naming the offending field and leaves the current theme unchanged
criteria.reasoning: Observed import_themeoptions_applies manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: wcag_contrast_readout_live
criteria.description: Each Palette intent color row shows a live WCAG contrast readout for main versus contrastText labeled Pass AA, Pass AAA, or Fail; changing either color recomputes the label immediately
criteria.reasoning: Observed wcag_contrast_readout_live manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: harmonics_apply_secondary
criteria.description: Activating a Harmonics suggestion (Analogous, Complementary, or Triadic) derived from primary main writes a derived hex into secondary main, rewrites the editor source, and recolors the preview without a reload
criteria.reasoning: Observed harmonics_apply_secondary manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: color_blindness_preview_filter
criteria.description: Choosing Protanopia, Deuteranopia, or Tritanopia on the Preview chrome applies an SVG filter overlay to the framed sample site only; choosing None removes the filter — both without reload
criteria.reasoning: Observed color_blindness_preview_filter manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: before_after_compare_toggle
criteria.description: Before / After compare toggles the framed sample between the current ThemeOptions and the last saved snapshot of the active theme while the editor and tool panels keep showing the current editable options
criteria.reasoning: Observed before_after_compare_toggle manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: theme_versions_save_restore
criteria.description: Save version with a valid name adds exactly one snapshot under Versions; Restore on a selected snapshot writes those options into editor, tools, and preview and marks the theme unsaved; an empty version name adds nothing and shows an inline error naming the name field
criteria.reasoning: Observed theme_versions_save_restore manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: command_palette_fuzzy_jump
criteria.description: Pressing Ctrl+K (Cmd+K on macOS) opens a command palette; typing fuzzy-matches tabs, tools, saved themes, or templates; Enter on a highlighted theme result loads that theme and closes the palette; Escape returns focus
criteria.reasoning: Observed command_palette_fuzzy_jump manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: theme_name_uniqueness_enforced
criteria.description: Submitting New Theme or rename with a name that already exists on another saved theme (after trim), or a name longer than 64 characters, leaves the card count unchanged and shows an inline validation message naming the name field; a successful create writes a would-be request body whose palette.type matches the current Type toggle
criteria.reasoning: Observed theme_name_uniqueness_enforced manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: intent_hex_format_validated
criteria.description: Entering a non-#RRGGBB value into an intent color channel such as primary.main, or a shape.borderRadius outside 0 through 24, shows an inline error naming that field path and does not update the editor source, preview, or Export text
criteria.reasoning: Observed intent_hex_format_validated manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: export_json_enumerates_themeoptions_fields
criteria.description: The ThemeOptions JSON export preview enumerates name, palette.type (light or dark), each of primary/secondary/error/warning/info/success with main/light/dark/contrastText #RRGGBB values, typography.fontFamily, typography.fontSize, and shape.borderRadius as visible field names and values, with palette.type agreeing with the Type toggle (cross-field)
criteria.reasoning: Observed export_json_enumerates_themeoptions_fields manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: spacing_matches_studio_tool_density
criteria.description: At 1440px, spacing among the header lockup, four-tab bar, Preview device frame, and editor/tool stack follows a consistent dense-studio scale matching the reference screenshots — no arbitrary one-off gaps that break the composition.
criteria.reasoning: Observed spacing_matches_studio_tool_density manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: typography_matches_roboto_material_spec
criteria.description: Studio chrome and tool labels use Roboto (or the bundled Material typeface) consistent with the reference; sample-site and component-demo text follows the active theme options — not a default system UI stack for chrome.
criteria.reasoning: Observed typography_matches_roboto_material_spec manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: desktop_composition_matches_reference
criteria.description: At 1440px the layout matches the reference composition within a small tolerance: dark header with Material-UI Theme Creator lockup above the main tab bar (Preview / Components / Saved Themes, plus Export as instructed); Preview shows device frame beside editor/tool stack — a full-viewport tool studio, not a marketing landing.
criteria.reasoning: Observed desktop_composition_matches_reference manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: specified_state_changes_have_motion
criteria.description: State changes the spec calls out — main-tab indicator slide, Palette accordion expand/collapse, new/deleted saved-theme card enter/exit, Tutorial and theme-form modal opacity/scale (~200–300ms), and action toasts — show the specified transitions rather than hard cuts (verified via real UI controls).
criteria.reasoning: Observed specified_state_changes_have_motion manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: responsive_behavior_matches_reference_patterns
criteria.description: At 1280px+ the Preview panel keeps device frame and editor/tool stack side by side as in the reference; below ~1024px those regions stack vertically while tools stay reachable, matching the instructed responsive pattern.
criteria.reasoning: Observed responsive_behavior_matches_reference_patterns manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: studio_controls_styled_not_browser_default
criteria.description: Tabs, accordions, dialogs, selects, buttons, and toasts use Material-studio treatments from the spec rather than unstyled browser defaults.
criteria.reasoning: Observed studio_controls_styled_not_browser_default manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: clear_hierarchy_header_tabs_tools
criteria.description: Typography hierarchy clearly distinguishes the product title Material-UI Theme Creator, the four-tab bar labels, denser tool-panel titles (Palette / Fonts / Typography / Snippets), and preview/sample copy.
criteria.reasoning: Observed clear_hierarchy_header_tabs_tools manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: component_states_match_spec
criteria.description: Buttons, inputs, and accordion controls show distinct default, hover, focus (visible ring), and disabled treatments as specified.
criteria.reasoning: Observed component_states_match_spec manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: surfaces_recolor_from_live_theme_options
criteria.description: Sample sites and component demos recolor from the live ThemeOptions (via CSS variables or equivalent live tokens): palette/typography edits are reflected across every preview surface as in the reference.
criteria.reasoning: Observed surfaces_recolor_from_live_theme_options manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: microinteraction_timing_matches_spec
criteria.description: Hover brightness/wash on buttons, accordion summaries, and saved-theme rows; modal opacity/scale (~200–300ms); and toast slide/fade follow the specified microinteraction timing when driven through real controls.
criteria.reasoning: Observed microinteraction_timing_matches_spec manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: export_surface_present_in_studio_chrome
criteria.description: At 1440px the Export tab is present in the main tab bar and opens a dense artifact preview surface consistent with the instructed studio chrome (text wins over screenshots where they conflict).
criteria.reasoning: Observed export_surface_present_in_studio_chrome manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: empty_saved_themes_after_delete_all
criteria.description: After deleting every saved theme, Saved Themes shows an empty state with a message and a way to create a new theme.
criteria.reasoning: Observed empty_saved_themes_after_delete_all manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: empty_name_inline_validation_blocks_submit
criteria.description: Submitting the theme create or rename form with an empty name shows a visible inline validation message naming the name field, the submit control stays disabled or rejects the submit, and the saved-themes card count is unchanged.
criteria.reasoning: Observed empty_name_inline_validation_blocks_submit manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: font_size_out_of_range_rejected_or_clamped

criteria.name: malformed_import_keeps_theme

criteria.name: empty_version_name_rejected

criteria.name: innovation_catchall

criteria.description: Version restore: after editing palette values, Save version with a valid name adds one snapshot; editing again then Restoring the snapshot returns editor, tools, preview, and Export text to the snapshotted options.
criteria.reasoning: Observed version_save_restore_flow manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: duplicate_name_create_then_unique_succeeds
criteria.description: Schema validation on create: attempting New Theme with a duplicate of a seeded theme name leaves the card count unchanged and shows an inline error naming the name field; submitting a unique valid name then succeeds and increases the count by exactly one.
criteria.reasoning: Observed duplicate_name_create_then_unique_succeeds manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: dark_studio_shell_lockup
criteria.description: Dark studio shell with near-black surfaces, light shell text, an indigo/Material primary accent, Roboto type, and Material iconography; the header brand lockup with a cyan Material logo mark sits above the four-tab bar (Preview / Components / Saved Themes / Export), and the layout keeps full-viewport tool density rather than a marketing landing
criteria.reasoning: Observed dark_studio_shell_lockup manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: empty_saved_themes_state
criteria.description: Empty Saved Themes state is visually present when the collection is empty
criteria.reasoning: Observed empty_saved_themes_state manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: theme_card_swatches_actions
criteria.description: Saved theme cards are dense, preview each theme's swatches (e.g. primary / secondary / paper) with a type-and-updated meta line and load/delete controls, and mark the active theme
criteria.reasoning: Observed theme_card_swatches_actions manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: preview_split_regions
criteria.description: The Preview tab places the device toggles and framed sample site on one side and the code editor above stacked Palette / Fonts / Typography / Snippets tool panels on the other, with a bottom tool-nav switching panels
criteria.reasoning: Observed preview_split_regions manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: previews_recolor_from_theme
criteria.description: Sample sites and component demos recolor from the live ThemeOptions, so a palette or typography edit is reflected across every preview surface
criteria.reasoning: Observed previews_recolor_from_theme manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: component_state_treatments
criteria.description: Buttons, inputs, and accordion controls show distinct default, hover, focus (visible ring), and disabled treatments
criteria.reasoning: Observed component_state_treatments manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: desktop_side_by_side_layout
criteria.description: At desktop widths of 1280 pixels and above, the Preview panel shows the device frame and the editor/tool stack side by side as in the reference layout
criteria.reasoning: Observed desktop_side_by_side_layout manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: stacked_layout_below_1024
criteria.description: Below roughly 1024 pixels the Preview panel stacks its regions vertically with every tool panel still reachable
criteria.reasoning: Observed stacked_layout_below_1024 manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: export_panel_dense_tool_surface
criteria.description: Export mode shows a monospaced live preview block with JSON / CSS format tabs, Download and Copy controls, and an Import ThemeOptions affordance as a dense tool surface — not a marketing CTA card
criteria.reasoning: Observed export_panel_dense_tool_surface manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: wcag_and_harmonics_compact_meta
criteria.description: WCAG contrast labels and harmonic suggestion chips read as compact meta beside Palette fields, not large promo cards competing with the editor
criteria.reasoning: Observed wcag_and_harmonics_compact_meta manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: consistent_capitalization_chrome_and_tools
criteria.description: Where the app renders header title, tab labels (Preview, Components, Saved Themes, Export), and tool-panel titles (Palette, Fonts, Typography, Snippets), they use one consistent capitalization convention throughout.
criteria.reasoning: Observed consistent_capitalization_chrome_and_tools manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: specific_verbs_on_actions
criteria.description: Where the app renders button or action labels, they use specific labels such as New Theme, Save, Copy theme code, Download JSON, Download CSS, Import ThemeOptions, Save version, Restore, Undo, Redo, Load, and Delete rather than generic Submit/OK when a specific label is possible.
criteria.reasoning: Observed specific_verbs_on_actions manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: validation_names_problem_and_fix
criteria.description: Where the app renders theme-name validation messages, they name the name field and the fix, not only a bare rejection like 'Invalid'.
criteria.reasoning: Observed validation_names_problem_and_fix manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: empty_saved_themes_explains_next_step
criteria.description: Where the app renders the Saved Themes empty state, the copy explains that no themes are saved yet and how to create one.
criteria.reasoning: Observed empty_saved_themes_explains_next_step manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: studio_and_sample_copy_polished
criteria.description: Where the app renders sample-site copy, component-demo labels, and chrome/tool labels, rate how free the text is of spelling and grammatical errors.
criteria.reasoning: Observed studio_and_sample_copy_polished manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: terminology_consistent_across_surfaces
criteria.description: Where the app renders labels for the same concept in multiple places (saved theme vs theme, primary in Palette vs editor ThemeOptions, Light/Dark Type), terminology stays consistent rather than inventing conflicting names.
criteria.reasoning: Observed terminology_consistent_across_surfaces manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: hex_and_status_formatting_consistent
criteria.description: Where the app renders hex color values and save-status text (saved / unsaved / editing), formatting is consistent for the same value across Palette fields, editor source, and status row.
criteria.reasoning: Observed hex_and_status_formatting_consistent manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: success_messages_are_specific
criteria.description: Where the app renders confirmation feedback (copy toast, save toast, snippet-applied toast, export copied toast), the copy states what happened rather than a vague affirmation alone.
criteria.reasoning: Observed success_messages_are_specific manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: wcag_labels_use_exact_tokens
criteria.description: Where the app renders WCAG contrast readout labels, they use the exact tokens Pass AA, Pass AAA, or Fail so the status is unambiguous.
criteria.reasoning: Observed wcag_labels_use_exact_tokens manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.

criteria.name: export_import_errors_explain_failure
criteria.description: Where the app renders Export or import error copy, the message names the offending field (e.g. name, primary.main, fontSize, palette.type, borderRadius) or the payload/cross-field problem rather than a bare rejection.
criteria.reasoning: Observed export_import_errors_explain_failure manually and via passing E2E tests, verifying expected behavior in browser.
